arts.ttl: Maduro responds to Almere City dismissal: “It hurts me to have to leave this club”
arts.sum: After news of his sacking was officially announced on Wednesday, former Almere City boss Hedwiges Maduro has responded via Instagram.

arts.ttl: Preview: Almere City vs. Heerenveen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Eredivisie clash between Almere City and Heerenveen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
